creator: rnoll.bsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214571
Reject file when patching modules.conf

When building FreeSWITCH 1.10.2, the build fails at the patch stage. Ports tree date is Thu May 14 01:37:55 UTC 2020.

Apparently the patch fails when applying the extrapatch-modules.conf to modules.conf. Below is the Poudriere log and attached is the modules.conf.rej file.
